masterworks.opentdb.5005d07f0a1f1c9f.explanation: George Orwell's Nineteen Eighty-Four depicts a society under total surveillance and ideological control.
masterworks.opentdb.5005d07f0a1f1c9f.details: Big Brother, the Thought Police, and the telescreen became enduring symbols of invasive government power.

masterworks.opentdb.b8291c782a9f0a66.explanation: The main Harry Potter series contains seven novels.
masterworks.opentdb.b8291c782a9f0a66.details: Each broadly follows one school year, from Philosopher's Stone through Deathly Hallows.

masterworks.opentdb.e45d776d29ced78c.explanation: Ingsoc—Newspeak for English Socialism—is the ruling ideology of Oceania in Nineteen Eighty-Four.
masterworks.opentdb.e45d776d29ced78c.details: The Inner Party uses Ingsoc to justify total surveillance, historical revision, and control of language and thought.

masterworks.opentdb.7b7a6fc0bc4d2e6d.explanation: Jamie Foxx sings the Ray Charles-derived hook on Kanye West's Gold Digger.
masterworks.opentdb.7b7a6fc0bc4d2e6d.details: Foxx had just portrayed Charles in Ray, the performance that won him the Academy Award for Best Actor.

masterworks.opentdb.2d23b8ac0bbbfce4.explanation: Holden Caulfield narrates and stars in The Catcher in the Rye.
masterworks.opentdb.2d23b8ac0bbbfce4.details: The alienated teenager recounts several days in New York while criticizing adult “phoniness” and resisting change.

masterworks.opentdb.90dc1659d145fce5.explanation: A Study in Scarlet is the first Sherlock Holmes novel.
masterworks.opentdb.90dc1659d145fce5.details: Published in 1887, it introduces Holmes, Dr. Watson, 221B Baker Street, and their investigative partnership.

masterworks.opentdb.b57c7a48942faa9c.details: The 1978 album includes Heart of Glass and helped move the band from New York punk into international pop success.

masterworks.opentdb.f34075db69023aaf.explanation: Ludwig van Beethoven composed the Piano Sonata No. 14, popularly called the Moonlight Sonata.
masterworks.opentdb.f34075db69023aaf.details: The nickname was added after Beethoven's death; he titled the 1801 work Sonata quasi una fantasia.

masterworks.opentdb.8c46e212ce272937.explanation: Frankenstein carries the subtitle The Modern Prometheus.
masterworks.opentdb.8c46e212ce272937.details: The subtitle compares Victor Frankenstein's creation of life with Prometheus's mythic theft of divine fire for humanity.

masterworks.opentdb.b12ea8d68ed61dcc.explanation: Robbie Williams released Angels in 1997 after leaving Take That.
masterworks.opentdb.b12ea8d68ed61dcc.details: The ballad became one of his signature songs and helped establish his successful solo career.

masterworks.opentdb.f44d2fc57fe43604.details: She began the story during the famous 1816 gathering near Lake Geneva and published it anonymously in 1818.

masterworks.opentdb.d108d1725dba7793.explanation: Charles Dickens wrote A Tale of Two Cities.
masterworks.opentdb.d108d1725dba7793.details: Set in London and Paris around the French Revolution, it opens with the famous contrast “It was the best of times, it was the worst of times.”

masterworks.opentdb.b7810b714d6cd932.explanation: Hunter S. Thompson wrote Fear and Loathing in Las Vegas.
masterworks.opentdb.b7810b714d6cd932.details: The book blends reporting, memoir, exaggeration, and drug-fueled satire in the style Thompson called gonzo journalism.

masterworks.opentdb.1bb305b2a422f94c.explanation: John Green wrote The Fault in Our Stars.
masterworks.opentdb.1bb305b2a422f94c.details: The novel follows teenagers Hazel and Augustus as they fall in love after meeting through a cancer support group.

masterworks.opentdb.2aa3754bfa7b8e7b.explanation: Jack Dawkins is better known as the Artful Dodger in Oliver Twist.
masterworks.opentdb.2aa3754bfa7b8e7b.details: The streetwise pickpocket introduces Oliver to Fagin's gang and earns his nickname through skill and evasiveness.

masterworks.opentdb.3bbdf26b9bc7a023.explanation: Amy March ultimately marries Laurie in Little Women.
masterworks.opentdb.3bbdf26b9bc7a023.details: Laurie first proposes to Jo, who refuses him; he later reconnects with Amy in Europe.

masterworks.opentdb.7d1c6f2bef615219.explanation: Bard the Bowman kills Smaug in The Hobbit.
masterworks.opentdb.7d1c6f2bef615219.details: He shoots the dragon's unprotected chest with the Black Arrow after learning of the weak spot from a thrush.

masterworks.opentdb.5ac2faece6d9d842.explanation: Locke Lamora is known in Camorr's underworld as the Thorn of Camorr.
masterworks.opentdb.5ac2faece6d9d842.details: The mysterious title magnifies his reputation as the leader of the Gentleman Bastards and a master confidence trickster.

masterworks.opentdb.6deb5e7074ce2443.explanation: Glóin is Gimli's father in The Lord of the Rings.
masterworks.opentdb.6deb5e7074ce2443.details: Glóin was one of the thirteen dwarves who accompanied Thorin Oakenshield in The Hobbit.

masterworks.opentdb.f439265475e3b221.explanation: Nine Rings of Power were given to mortal Men.
masterworks.opentdb.f439265475e3b221.details: Tolkien's ring verse counts three for Elves, seven for Dwarves, nine for Men, and the One Ring made by Sauron.

masterworks.opentdb.aa31e3c1d124ef70.explanation: Slash is strongly associated with the Gibson Les Paul Standard guitar.
masterworks.opentdb.aa31e3c1d124ef70.details: His Les Paul tone and appearance became central to the visual and musical identity of Guns N' Roses.

masterworks.opentdb.e41d87d2bded4b35.explanation: Mein Kampf translates from German as My Struggle.
masterworks.opentdb.e41d87d2bded4b35.details: Hitler's political autobiography and manifesto combined personal narrative with the antisemitic and expansionist ideology later pursued by the Nazi regime.

masterworks.opentdb.4539a142bbe2489e.explanation: Saphira is Eragon's dragon in Christopher Paolini's Inheritance Cycle.
masterworks.opentdb.4539a142bbe2489e.details: Her hatching bonds her magically with Eragon and makes him one of the last Dragon Riders.

masterworks.opentdb.c7e5cfd67cb98307.explanation: Ponyboy Curtis belongs to the Greasers in The Outsiders.
masterworks.opentdb.c7e5cfd67cb98307.details: The working-class Greasers clash with the wealthier Socs, framing S. E. Hinton's exploration of class, loyalty, and violence.

masterworks.opentdb.491427deb25974ae.explanation: Pablo Honey was Radiohead's debut studio album.
masterworks.opentdb.491427deb25974ae.details: Released in 1993, it contains Creep, the early hit that initially defined the band before its later experimentation.

masterworks.opentdb.25c7c5e9ac237634.explanation: Jules Verne's castaways name their refuge Lincoln Island in The Mysterious Island.
masterworks.opentdb.25c7c5e9ac237634.details: The name honors U.S. president Abraham Lincoln, fitting the novel's American Civil War-era protagonists.

masterworks.opentdb.80bd0b461454934b.explanation: Most rock music uses 4/4 time, with four quarter-note beats in each measure.
masterworks.opentdb.80bd0b461454934b.details: Its strong, regular backbeat makes it easy to count “one, two, three, four” and supports drums, bass, and riffs.

masterworks.opentdb.fff28900f6cc3ab7.explanation: Walk This Way appears on Aerosmith's Toys in the Attic.
masterworks.opentdb.fff28900f6cc3ab7.details: The 1975 song gained a second life through the landmark 1986 collaboration between Aerosmith and Run-DMC.

masterworks.opentdb.83dae6454bbf9b8a.explanation: John Steinbeck chronicled a road trip with his poodle in Travels with Charley.
masterworks.opentdb.83dae6454bbf9b8a.details: Published in 1962, the travelogue reflects on American places and people Steinbeck encountered while driving across the country.

masterworks.opentdb.f44e324f560dae42.explanation: John Lennon leads the Beatles across the zebra crossing on the Abbey Road cover.
masterworks.opentdb.f44e324f560dae42.details: Behind him walk Ringo Starr, Paul McCartney, and George Harrison; the image was photographed outside EMI Studios.

masterworks.opentdb.98b5766847c93b74.explanation: Vienna gives its name to Ultravox's 1981 hit.
masterworks.opentdb.98b5766847c93b74.details: The atmospheric synth-pop song became the band's signature recording despite peaking at number two in the UK.

masterworks.opentdb.3f2065fd1e64e67a.details: Her red hair and Union Jack dress made the nickname and image especially memorable during the Spice Girls' 1990s peak.

masterworks.opentdb.ba9f942604f580ed.explanation: Anna Karenina was written by Leo Tolstoy, not Fyodor Dostoevsky.
masterworks.opentdb.ba9f942604f580ed.details: Dostoevsky's major novels include Crime and Punishment, The Idiot, Demons, and The Brothers Karamazov.

masterworks.opentdb.789b62aa5ac825f1.explanation: Alesso was not a member of Swedish House Mafia.
masterworks.opentdb.789b62aa5ac825f1.details: The supergroup's core trio is Axwell, Steve Angello, and Sebastian Ingrosso; Alesso is a separate Swedish producer.

masterworks.opentdb.7facd482f786f7e5.explanation: U2 appears on Kendrick Lamar's DAMN. in the song XXX.
masterworks.opentdb.7facd482f786f7e5.details: The unexpected collaboration pairs Kendrick's shifting rap narrative with vocals from Bono.

masterworks.opentdb.dde3fc1e90b8829b.explanation: Waves is not on Kanye West's Graduation.
masterworks.opentdb.dde3fc1e90b8829b.details: Waves appears on The Life of Pablo; Graduation includes Stronger, Good Life, Flashing Lights, and Homecoming.

masterworks.opentdb.a101f62f8d51fb1f.explanation: Benjamin Goldwasser and Andrew VanWyngarden formed MGMT.
masterworks.opentdb.a101f62f8d51fb1f.details: The psychedelic pop-rock duo broke through with Oracular Spectacular and songs including Kids, Electric Feel, and Time to Pretend.

masterworks.opentdb.9dc412d485bfc75b.explanation: Dave Mustaine was Metallica's original lead guitarist before being dismissed in 1983.
masterworks.opentdb.9dc412d485bfc75b.details: He subsequently founded Megadeth, creating one of thrash metal's other defining bands.

masterworks.opentdb.e7c6195b33f6fcf5.explanation: Rammstein produced two official videos for Du riechst so gut.
masterworks.opentdb.e7c6195b33f6fcf5.details: The original accompanied the 1995 release; a new video arrived with the song's 1998 reissue.

masterworks.opentdb.3fd850c6a6b33bf1.explanation: Leo Tolstoy wrote War and Peace.
masterworks.opentdb.3fd850c6a6b33bf1.details: The epic interweaves aristocratic families, Napoleon's invasion of Russia, historical argument, and intimate personal transformation.

masterworks.opentdb.34b645869d134990.explanation: Steven Erikson wrote the ten-volume Malazan Book of the Fallen.
masterworks.opentdb.34b645869d134990.details: The series is known for its enormous cast, ancient history, military campaigns, and refusal to explain its world simplistically.

masterworks.opentdb.3bc7e06a72278f0f.explanation: George R. R. Martin wrote A Song of Ice and Fire.
masterworks.opentdb.3bc7e06a72278f0f.details: The fantasy series begins with A Game of Thrones and inspired HBO's television adaptation Game of Thrones.

masterworks.opentdb.6ac3256219e3d109.explanation: Abel Magwitch is the escaped convict and secret benefactor in Great Expectations.
masterworks.opentdb.6ac3256219e3d109.details: Pip initially assumes Miss Havisham funds his rise, making Magwitch's return a major reversal in the novel.

masterworks.opentdb.251b9d7922cc1289.explanation: Mark Watney spends 549 Martian solar days stranded in Andy Weir's novel The Martian.
masterworks.opentdb.251b9d7922cc1289.details: A Martian day, or sol, is about 39 minutes longer than an Earth day; the film shortens portions of the timeline.

masterworks.opentdb.d6558e658d818102.details: Their son Scorpius becomes a major character in Harry Potter and the Cursed Child.

masterworks.opentdb.121cb6e935770c81.explanation: Magic: The Gathering's Homelands expansion is set on Ulgrotha.
masterworks.opentdb.121cb6e935770c81.details: The isolated plane is shaped by magical devastation and the struggle among Baron Sengir, Serra's followers, and other factions.

masterworks.opentdb.93c8b31a362b2428.explanation: Mark Twain's The Prince and the Pauper has Edward Tudor exchange identities with poor boy Tom Canty.
masterworks.opentdb.93c8b31a362b2428.details: Their experiences expose each child to the injustices and constraints of the other's social class.

masterworks.opentdb.a6c1c0fbcff6b22c.explanation: Black Sabbath formed in Birmingham, England.
masterworks.opentdb.a6c1c0fbcff6b22c.details: The industrial city's heavy atmosphere is often connected to the dark, weighty sound that helped define heavy metal.

masterworks.opentdb.f915ebc1fadba72e.explanation: Nicki Minaj was born in Trinidad and Tobago.
masterworks.opentdb.f915ebc1fadba72e.details: She was born in Port of Spain and moved to Queens, New York, as a child.

masterworks.opentdb.ecc9263ed6e85d60.explanation: Thomas Hardy set many novels in the fictional English region of Wessex.
masterworks.opentdb.ecc9263ed6e85d60.details: His Wessex maps real southwestern counties into a shared literary landscape for works such as Tess of the d'Urbervilles.
